proposed_claim_text: The primary frames contained 217,200 eligible SoG checklist events from 2005 and 8,584 eligible WCVI checklist events from 2015, with responses read only through 2025.
permitted_wording: eligible checklist events in the frozen frame
prohibited_wording: bird population size or survey census
required_qualification: counts are checklist-frame sizes, not independent birds or population abundance
reason_for_status: directly verified in aggregate sample-size output

proposed_claim_text: SoG ecological guild detection associations were heterogeneous: five of seven estimates were positive and two were negative, with all seven BH q-values below 0.05.
multiplicity_status: BH within registered M01 SoG detection family
prohibited_wording: universal positive response or causal aggregation effect
required_qualification: non-null specificity panel and checklist selection limit ecological specificity
reason_for_status: registered complete family; direction and multiplicity are transparent

proposed_claim_text: SoG ecological guild positive-count associations were heterogeneous, including positive, negative, and imprecise coefficients.
estimand_identifier: active-near positive log count conditional on numeric detection
prohibited_wording: abundance or biomass change
required_qualification: conditional on a positive numeric report; X is not a numeric count
reason_for_status: complete family prevents significance-only reporting

proposed_claim_text: WCVI guild coefficients differed by guild and outcome; matched 2-km and dominant-observer sensitivities preserved the matched-reference sign in 15 of 16 components each.
estimand_identifier: matched M01 checklist detection and positive-log-count associations
singular_fit_status: 17 of 32 sensitivity/reference components in Figure 4 have singular warnings
multiplicity_status: BH within model-version x region x outcome family
prohibited_wording: fully robust or unbiased WCVI effect
required_qualification: sparse geometry and singular random-effect fits remain visible
reason_for_status: two prespecified dimensions generally preserve sign but boundary fits preclude unqualified robustness

proposed_claim_text: Surf Scoter and Short-billed Gull had positive detection and conditional positive-count coefficients in both primary regions, while other priority species were region- or component-dependent.
estimand_identifier: M02 active-near detection and conditional positive count
singular_fit_status: ordinary fits in frozen M02 table
prohibited_wording: all focal species aggregated or increased
required_qualification: interpretation is checklist-conditional and not movement evidence
reason_for_status: two species show cross-region direction while other prespecified species do not

proposed_claim_text: Registered event-time coefficients varied across guilds, outcomes, windows, and regions rather than forming one common monotone trajectory.
prohibited_wording: causal event study or continuous trajectory
required_qualification: windows are discrete registered contrasts and include the falsification guild
reason_for_status: complete 160-row family supports a heterogeneity statement

proposed_claim_text: None of the 64 matched whole-bundle placebo components had BH q below 0.05.
regional_or_falsification_result: does not negate M29 true-exposure panel
multiplicity_status: BH within model-version x region x outcome family
prohibited_wording: placebos prove exchangeability or causal identification
required_qualification: diagnostic result only; null placebos do not erase residual confounding
reason_for_status: whole registered placebo bundle completed without failed components

proposed_claim_text: All 128 protected sensitivity components completed; 43 retained explicit singular-fit warnings and none failed.
prohibited_wording: all models fit without qualification
required_qualification: singularity implies one or more boundary variance terms; exact collapsed term is not in aggregate diagnostics
reason_for_status: direct execution accounting

proposed_claim_text: The SoG specificity panel was non-null for both Gadwall and Northern Shoveler detection.
multiplicity_status: BH within M29 SoG detection family
prohibited_wording: all falsification analyses were null or every primary association is spurious
required_qualification: targets detection specificity and shared seasonal/spatial/observation structure; it does not test positive counts
reason_for_status: materially changes interpretation and therefore belongs in the main manuscript

proposed_claim_text: The non-null SoG panel weakens causal and simple species-specific ecological interpretations but does not erase the descriptive checklist association.
permitted_wording: weakens specificity while retaining descriptive association
prohibited_wording: proof all primary associations are spurious
required_qualification: residual seasonal, spatial, submission, site-selection, and classification explanations remain plausible
reason_for_status: localized implication follows the registered purpose and observed magnitude

proposed_claim_text: The authoritative v1 pooling invalidation covers 6,562 finite rows in 112 historical families; v2 produced 162 compatible estimable families.
prohibited_wording: v1 pooled fields remain valid
required_qualification: historical v1 artifacts were not modified
reason_for_status: hash-checked repair output and accepted invalidation scope

proposed_claim_text: The initial pooling audit undercounted because the registered North-region literal code NA was parsed as missing; typed column-specific parsing repaired the scope.
permitted_wording: literal region code NA was preserved as a category
prohibited_wording: protected data were recovered or source missingness was imputed
required_qualification: repair used privacy-safe aggregate coefficients only
reason_for_status: implementation history is essential for reproducibility but not ecological headline

proposed_claim_text: The v2 release contains 6,085 posterior rows, 439 duplicate M11/M12 representations as explicit NA, and 38 noncompleted rows as explicit NA.
prohibited_wording: excluded rows are zero effects
required_qualification: duplicates are representations, not independent evidence
reason_for_status: complete row accounting

proposed_claim_text: M27/M28 moved the complete exposure bundle within region-year strata with zero fixed points and without reading response fields.
prohibited_wording: row-level independent randomization or causal permutation test
required_qualification: diagnostic preserves bundle distribution within strata
reason_for_status: registered transformation audit

proposed_claim_text: Surveyed-positive, surveyed-negative, and unmonitored-unknown DFO states remain distinct; missing herring components are not zero.
prohibited_wording: missing DFO records are negative spawn observations
required_qualification: incomplete monitoring can misclassify recorded exposure
reason_for_status: frozen claim boundary and data-governance rule

proposed_claim_text: Inference is conditional on eligible submitted complete eBird checklists after registered adjustment.
prohibited_wording: bird population response
required_qualification: submission and site selection remain possible
reason_for_status: core estimand boundary

proposed_claim_text: Observer and effort covariates reduce measured differences but do not eliminate unmeasured selection or submission bias.
source_row_or_deterministic_key: fixed predictor and random intercept specification
prohibited_wording: selection bias was eliminated
required_qualification: post-exposure visitation and unmeasured site choice may remain
reason_for_status: method adjustment cannot establish exchangeability

proposed_claim_text: M26 v1 was retired without replacement and is not interpreted inferentially.
prohibited_wording: M26 estimates visitation effects
required_qualification: historical artifact remains provenance only
reason_for_status: released summary lacked a registered contrast

proposed_claim_text: The analysis does not identify population abundance, biomass, occupancy, migration, individual movement, or causal effects.
permitted_wording: checklist encounter and conditional reported count
prohibited_wording: population abundance, biomass, occupancy, migration, movement, or causal effect
required_qualification: different designs and assumptions would be required
reason_for_status: the fitted estimands do not identify these targets

proposed_claim_text: The study demonstrates a causal effect of herring spawning on regional bird abundance.
prohibited_wording: causal effect or regional abundance
required_qualification: prohibited throughout
reason_for_status: outside the frozen estimand and contradicted by design limitations
